items.description: The representation of an unprocessed termination pay period.

start_date.description: The start date of the pay period.

end_date.description: The end date of the pay period.

check_date.description: The check date of the pay period.

debit_date.description: The debit date of the pay period.

employee_name.description: The full name of the employee.

employee_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the employee.

pay_schedule_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the pay schedule to which the pay period belongs.
